calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Free Energy Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and Varney Johnson, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:53 a.m.

Angie Hoar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff On Deck Capital, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Cathleen Pugh, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Hoar and Ms. Pugh appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Free Energy Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation, or Varney Johnson, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written Contract was filed on March 1, 2021, and personally served on defendants Free Energy Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and Varney Johnson, an individual, on April 2, 2021.
Default as to each defendant was entered on August 2, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 2, 2021.

Plaintiff On Deck Capital, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Business Loan and Security Agreement Supplement............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: On Deck Capital's Transaction History......................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of
Plaintiff On Deck Capital, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the defaulted defendants Free Energy Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and Varney Johnson, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $127,938.38.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $744.70.

Total - $131,508.08.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 11:11 a.m.
